scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; *) [ -n "$CI" ] && exit 0 || { echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1; } ;; esac'
scripts.build: npx --yes pnpm@9 install --frozen-lockfile && npx pnpm --filter @workspace/rsr-scribe run build:deploy
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
